dataset: Jurism Legal References (Miranda v. Arizona case)

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 7-8 creates this path and filename
export_result.sh (line 19) defines linkMode 2 as 'Linked File'; verifier.py (line 88) expects this value

privileged_info_summary: The task involves linking an external PDF file (Miranda_Opinion.pdf) located at /home/ga/Documents/CaseFiles/Project_X/ to the 'Miranda v. Arizona' case (384 U.S. 436, 1966) in a Jurism legal reference library. The attachment must use linkMode 2 (Linked File), not linkMode 0 (Imported/Stored Copy). This is the landmark 1966 US Supreme Court case establishing Miranda warning requirements for police custody interrogation.
